title: elaeocarpus alanganorum
intro: Elaeocarpus alanganorum, a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, is a tree native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus alanganorum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus alanganorum include infusions and decoctions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
